_comment: Manual URL->reisecode overrides for travels the automatic derivation (/{land2.seo}/{slugify(titel)} validated against the sitemap) misses: combos, renamed slugs, trips whose website slug differs from the TourOne title. Value is a reisecode string or a list of reisecodes. Keys starting with _ are ignored. Seed this by running `python travel_index.py` and reviewing the 'unmatched' list.
_seeded: 2026-07-04 from the live dry run: sitemap URLs whose TourOne land2.seo path differs from the website's country path (Kap-Verde vs Kapverden, Europa vs Asien Kaukasus, Albanien-Nordmazedonien vs Albanien, ...) or whose suffix defeats canonical matching (Limpopo_ALL underscore, Vestfirdir-LH).
_20260706: Since the widget-code refinement (data-terminliste + masterCode expansion) these overrides are FALLBACKS for days the page fetch fails, plus the primary mapping for widget-less pages (Limpopo_ALL chooser, Kaukasus 404). Queen-Charlotte's 2026-07-05 entry was removed: the refinement derives NZQUE+NZQUE_UR from the page itself. Gjirokaster-NEU trimmed to the season code its widget queries — the old 3-code family over-injected 9 rows of the previous season.
